name: chart-line-label
visual_summary: Chart-line-label is a data visualization component that displays a line chart with customizable labels. It's ideal for showing trends over time or displaying large-scale data. Developers can leverage this component to add insightful visualizations to their dashboards or reports.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-label
Description: Chart-line-label is a data visualization component that displays a line chart with customizable labels. It's ideal for showing trends over time or displaying large-scale data. Developers can leverage this component to add insightful visualizations to their dashboards or reports.
Style: customizable-visuals, material-design
Interactions: 
Tags: data-visualization, chart, line-chart, label, trend-analysis

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
